jobs.title: Elementary K-5 Teacher Openings for the 26-27 school year (Full and Part Time)

jobs.title: Elementary Administrative Teacher on Special Assignment
jobs.status: Full Time, 1 FTELevel 3 Teacher on Special Assignment includes a temporary/at-will contract for 18 extra days on contract.Minimum RequirementsEDUCATION and/or EXPERIENCEA minimum of a Bachelor's Degree and a minimum of 3 years of successful teaching experience in a WCSD elementary setting.CERTIFICATES, LICENSES, REGISTRATIONSMust have an active Utah professional level Elementary License AND an active Utah School Leadership License.At least one of the following endorsements is preferred:  Reading/Literacy, ESL, Math, or Information TechnologyThe salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule. jobs.title: Substitute Bus Driver Trainee
jobs.status: On-Call/As NeededMinimum QualificationsMinimum age of 21 years.Have no more than 100 points recorded on past driving record.  No more than two at-fault accidents, two citations, or a combination of one at-fault accident and one citation, in a 24 month period.Hold and maintain a Utah Commercial Drivers License.  Driver Training will be provided if candidate needs to obtain the Utah Commercial Drivers License.The salary for this position is assigned to the BD Salary ScheduleAFTER completion of training.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkBD Salary Schedule.APPLICANTS ARE REQUIRED TO ATTACH/UPLOAD A COPY OF THEIR CURRENT DRIVING RECORD WITH THE APPLICATIONA copy of the driving record can be obtained from the Department of Motor Vehicles.Attachment(s):Bus Driver & Sub Bus Driver.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version

jobs.title: Assistant Girls Volleyball Coach (no teaching assignment)
jobs.description: This Assistant Girls Volleyball coaching assignment is for the 2026-2027 school year with no expectation of a teaching assignment.WCSD coaches are required to meet all UHSAA certification requirementspriorto starting assignment and are required to maintain certifications during duration of employment.If any additional questions, applicants can contact the Athletic Director, Randy Wyatt, at randy.wyatt@washk12.org.A stipend will be provided for this assignment.

jobs.title: Learning Coach
jobs.status: Full Time, 1 FTEMinimum Requirements:An Active Professional level Utah Teaching License.  ESL endorsement would be beneficial.Must have successfully completed a minimum of 3 years general classroom teaching experience.  Candidates with WCSD teaching experience are preferred.As per the Utah State Board of Education, completion of LETRS training is required for all elementary learning coaches.  Starting in the 2023-24 school year, completion of the USBE Instructional Coaching Endorsement and WCSD Teacher Leader Endorsement are recommended within the first 3 years of service in this role.The salary for this position is assigned to the TT Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkTT Salary Schedule.For new hires & rehires, WCSD will recognize no more than thirteen full time, complete years of previous teaching experience when placing on the TT Salary Schedule. jobs.title: Substitute Bus Attendant
jobs.status: On-Call/As Needed BasisMinimum Requirements:High school diploma or general education degree (GED); or six months to one year related experience and/or training; or equivalent combination of education and experience.Ability to work effectively with individuals with disabilities.  Ability to learn tasks quickly and work with minimum supervision.  Ability to learn and implement emergency procedures associated with bus.  Previous experience working with individuals with disabilities preferred.The salary for this position is assigned to Level 2 of the SC Salary Schedule.To view the salary schedule, please select the following linkSC Salary Schedule.Attachment(s):Bus Attendant.pdfEmail To A FriendPrint Version
